data_sources.name: Arkansas Alpha-gal Mandatory Reporting Data (2023–2025)
data_sources.description: Mandatory reporting numbers: 304 cases in 2023, 2,613 in 2024, 3,781 in 2025. Northern Arkansas is the clear hotspot.
data_sources.notes: First state to mandate reporting — excellent concrete yearly progression data for the red layer.

data_sources.name: California Lyme Disease Cases 2024 (CDPH Annual Report)
data_sources.description: 96 total reported cases in 2024 (down slightly from 2023). County-level breakdowns included.
data_sources.notes: Reinforces very low incidence on the West Coast.

notes_for_pipeline: Use the 2023 Lyme county CSV as the base layer. Overlay AGS estimates from MO/AR dashboards for contrast. West Coast stays low-intensity on both. Most other items in this dump were already integrated from prior batches.
